title: Mid-Level Instructional Designer at Arihant Publications South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Instructional Designer at Arihant Publications South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Join the Arihant Publications South Asia Partners family as a Instructional Designer in Bhopal. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Arihant Publications South Asia Partners:
Arihant Publications South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Arihant Publications South Asia Partners!
